heading: Nonapplicability of other laws
label: 2711 Nonapplicability of other laws
text: Notwithstanding any provision of law which limits the nature, amount, term, form, or rate of interest, or the nature, amount, or form of security of loans or advances of credit, loans, or advances of credit may be made in accordance with the provisions of this chapter without regard to such provision of law.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior , which related to waiver and relaxation by institutions and approved mortgagees of limitations with respect to mortgage delinquencies; notification to Federal supervisory agency prior to foreclosure proceedings, was classified to prior to repeal by , , .section 110 of Pub.
